text:
On Sat, Apr 25, 1998 at 08:57:10PM -0700, Matthew Hunt wrote:

> - Shortened pkg/PLIST

That should be "pkg/DESCR".  Gratuitously removing lines from
PLIST would, of course, be a bad thing.
